prompt: CLAUDE.md 규칙들이 전부 '~하지마' 형태라서 좀 정리해주고 싶어. 긍정형으로 바꾸고, 중요도별로 분류해줘.

assertions.text: At least 80% of negative rules ('~하지마/금지/사용하지') converted to positive form
Rules organized into 2+ severity tiers (CRITICAL/MANDATORY/PREFER or equivalent)
Converted rules preserve the original intent (no information loss or meaning change)
Overall structure is improved (clearer sections, logical grouping)
If output exceeds 200 lines, .claude/rules/ split was performed
